headlines.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
headlines.summary: The countries reject 'any attempt, by any state or non-state actor, to hold Lebanon's future hostage', the US says.

headlines.title: US House delivers rebuke to Trump as it votes to halt Iran war
headlines.summary: In the 215-208 vote, four Republicans joined Democrats to pass the measure, which is largely symbolic.

headlines.title: Missing Sherpa guide found on Mount Everest after 'miracle' self-rescue
headlines.summary: Cleaners found Dawa Sherpa crawling towards Base Camp six days after he went missing at a higher altitude.

headlines.title: Ukraine accused of killing four in occupied Crimea
headlines.summary: At least 10 people have been injured in the attacks, according to Russian-backed officials.

headlines.title: Trump acknowledges calling Netanyahu 'crazy' and says Israel is complicating peace talks with Iran
headlines.summary: Israel's PM laughed off reports of friction, but he has tested the patience of other US presidents.

headlines.title: Kuwait briefly shut its main airport after Iranian drones heavily damaged passenger terminal
headlines.summary: An Indian national was killed and dozens wounded in the attack as ceasefire tensions continue.

headlines.title: Ukrainian drones hit St. Petersburg oil terminal before city hosts Russian economic forum
headlines.summary: Long-range Ukrainian drone strikes target Russian energy infrastructure ahead of major economic event.

headlines.title: Grab what you can while you can: The new reality in the South China Sea
headlines.summary: After years of watching China create land to back its expansive claims, others are doing the same.

headlines.title: Israeli strikes kill 11 people in Gaza City, medics say
headlines.summary: Women and children were among those killed when Israeli aircraft struck at least four residential buildings.

headlines.title: Heavy gunfire in Somali capital as row over election delay escalates
headlines.summary: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.
